description: Add notification center with badges, list, read/unread state, filtering, and persistence.

userStories.title: Add notifications schema and persistence
userStories.description: As a user, I want notifications stored so read state persists across sessions.
acceptanceCriteria: Add notifications table with read flag and timestamp
Migrations apply and existing data unaffected
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Backend API to fetch and update notifications
userStories.description: As a user, I want APIs to fetch notifications, mark read/unread, and clear read notifications.
acceptanceCriteria: List endpoint returns notifications with read state
Endpoints to mark read/unread and clear read notifications
Tests for server behavior pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Show unread badge in header
userStories.description: As a user, I want an unread badge on header icon so I know there are new notifications.
acceptanceCriteria: Header shows unread count badge when unread > 0
Badge updates after marking notifications read
Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Notification list UI with filters
userStories.description: As a user, I want to open a notification list and filter by read/unread state.
acceptanceCriteria: List UI shows notifications, supports filter All/Unread/Read
Infinite scroll or pagination for long lists
Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Mark notification read/unread
userStories.description: As a user, I want to mark notifications read or unread so my read state is accurate.
acceptanceCriteria: Tapping mark read/unread calls backend and updates UI immediately
Unread badge and counts update correctly
Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Clear all read notifications
userStories.description: As a user, I want to clear all read notifications to reduce clutter.
acceptanceCriteria: Add Clear All Read action that removes read notifications
Action confirms before destructive clear
Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill
Typecheck passes
